title: Capacity of Power Generating Plants Installed within the Boundaries of Regional Companies and Dams by Type of Prime Mover, Iran 1970 and 1971 (kW)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank); underlying data from Ministry of Water and Power (Iran)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1974_economic_development_vol4_statistical_appendix.pdf, Table 15.2, page 137 (PDF page 145). Rendered to PNG via pdftoppm -r 200 and visually read. No value interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
notes: Regional-company and named-dam breakdown (incl. the Mohammad Reza Shah Pahlavi Dam, Amir Kabir Dam, Farahnaz-e-Pahlavi Dam, Shahbanu Farah Dam, Shah Abbas-e-Kabir Dam, and the newly-installed 1971 Aras Dam) by prime-mover type (diesel/steam/gas/water). Companion to wb1974-electric-power-generation-by-use-1968-1972 (actual generation/consumption by use, not installed capacity).
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription with visual verification, pdftoppm -r 200 render + Read tool)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
